fields.label: Footer Column 1 Heading
fields.name: footer_col_1_heading
fields.instructions: Heading above the first footer link column (links come from Appearance → Menus → Footer Column 1).

fields.label: Footer Column 2 Heading
fields.name: footer_col_2_heading
fields.instructions: Heading above the second footer link column (Menus → Footer Column 2).

fields.label: Footer Column 3 Heading
fields.name: footer_col_3_heading
fields.instructions: Heading above the third footer link column (Menus → Footer Column 3).

fields.label: Note
fields.message: The logo is set under Appearance → Customize → Site Identity. Navigation menus are managed under Appearance → Menus (locations: Primary, Utility, Footer 1–3, Legal).
